description_long: This house features a striking modern design with two interlocking rectangular volumes, each topped with a sharply faceted, dark roof. The facade is characterized by bold geometric patterns, with a mix of black and wood-textured panels creating a dynamic visual contrast. Large, angular windows are set asymmetrically into the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The wood paneling wraps around portions of the exterior, softening the starkness of the black surfaces and adding warmth. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper level slightly offset, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is recessed and framed by glass, providing a sleek and inviting entrance.
description: A modern, two-story house with interlocking volumes, dark faceted roofs, and a mix of black and wood-textured panels, featuring large angular windows and a recessed glass entryway.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the geometric facade, large angular windows, and the main recessed glass entryway, with prominent wood and black paneling.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the sharply angled roof and a more minimal window arrangement, with mostly black surfaces and subtle wood accents.
description_view_2: The top-down view reveals the faceted, angular roof design and the offset arrangement of the two main volumes, with wood paneling visible on the sides.
description_view_3: The right side view displays a similar window pattern to the left, with the dark roof and black exterior dominating, and less visible wood paneling.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large angular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed glass entryway with minimal framing, no visible steps or porch, emphasizing a clean and contemporary look
